setup.title: MetService Weather
setup.description: Configure your MetService NZ weather integration.

data_description.tide_region: Select a marine region to get local tide times. Choose "None — skip" if you don't need tides.
data_description.boating_region_url: Select a marine region to get boating and surf conditions. Choose "None — skip" if you don't need this.
data_description.use_mobile: Only useful if your location is not in the list above, or if you want weather data to follow your current GPS position rather than a fixed location. Requires a private API key extracted from the MetService mobile app — see the repository README for instructions.
data_description.api_key: Required only when the legacy mobile API option above is enabled.

locations.title: Marine locations
locations.description: Choose the specific station for each marine feature you enabled.

error.api_key_required: An API key is required when using the legacy mobile API.
error.tide_location_not_found: Could not determine the URL for the selected tide station.
error.boating_location_not_found: Could not determine the URL for the selected boating location.

abort.tides_unavailable: Could not reach the MetService marine service. Check your connection and try again.
abort.boating_unavailable: Could not reach the MetService marine service. Check your connection and try again.
